title: Minor hand abrasion - laborer
description: Laborer sustained minor abrasion on left hand while handling curtain wall panel at Level 22. Glove had torn - worker had not replaced it. First aid applied on site. Worker returned to full duty. New gloves issued. Crew retrained on PPE inspection requirements.

title: Near miss - unsecured load on crane pick
description: Marble slab improperly rigged for crane pick at Level 1 staging. Slab shifted during lift - rigger noticed and set load down immediately. No workers in drop zone. Rigging crew retrained on stone slab lifts. Marble lifter clamps required for all future picks.

title: Struck-by - falling debris from curtain wall
description: Small section of foam backer rod fell from curtain wall installation at Level 18 and struck worker below on hard hat. No injury due to hard hat. Debris net installed below all curtain wall work. Curtain wall crew briefed on housekeeping above occupied work areas.
